tasks.name: Create types directory structure
tasks.purpose: Establish directory structure for dashboard type definitions following project conventions

constraints: Must follow existing pattern: apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/
Directory should be created with proper permissions

tasks.input_state: Directory apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/ exists but no types/ subdirectory
tasks.output_state: Directory apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/ exists and is ready for type files
tasks.verification_command: test -d apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types && echo '✓ Types directory exists'

tasks.name: Create base types file with imports
tasks.purpose: Set up type file skeleton with proper imports from Supabase-generated Database types

constraints: Must import Database type from apps/web/lib/database.types.ts
File must be at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts
Use export interface pattern (not export type)

tasks.input_state: Directory _lib/types/ exists; Database types available in apps/web/lib/database.types.ts
tasks.output_state: File user-dashboard.types.ts exists with Database import and file header comment
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists and imports Database type correctly

tasks.name: Add CourseProgressData interface
tasks.purpose: Define type for radial chart widget data derived from course_progress and lesson_progress tables

constraints: Use Pick/Omit to derive from Database types
Include completion_percentage, completed_at fields
Add JSDoc comment explaining purpose

tasks.input_state: File user-dashboard.types.ts exists with Database import
tasks.output_state: CourseProgressData interface exists with proper fields derived from Database types
tasks.acceptance_criterion: CourseProgressData interface is exported and includes completion_percentage field
tasks.verification_command: grep -q "export interface CourseProgressData" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && grep -q "completion_percentage" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add SurveyScoresData interface
tasks.purpose: Define type for spider diagram widget data derived from survey_responses table

constraints: Use Pick/Omit to derive from Database types
Include category_scores, highest_scoring_category, lowest_scoring_category fields
category_scores is Json type from Database
Add JSDoc comment explaining purpose

tasks.input_state: File user-dashboard.types.ts exists with Database import
tasks.output_state: SurveyScoresData interface exists with category_scores and related fields
tasks.acceptance_criterion: SurveyScoresData interface is exported and includes category_scores field
tasks.verification_command: grep -q "export interface SurveyScoresData" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && grep -q "category_scores" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add KanbanSummaryData interface
tasks.purpose: Define type for task summary card widget data derived from tasks and subtasks tables

constraints: Use Pick/Omit to derive from Database types
Include status, priority, phase fields from tasks
Should aggregate subtask counts
Add JSDoc comment explaining purpose

tasks.input_state: File user-dashboard.types.ts exists with Database import
tasks.output_state: KanbanSummaryData interface exists with task status and subtask count fields
tasks.acceptance_criterion: KanbanSummaryData interface is exported and includes status field
tasks.verification_command: grep -q "export interface KanbanSummaryData" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && grep -q "status" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add ActivityFeedItem interface
tasks.purpose: Define type for recent activity timeline widget supporting multiple activity types (lesson, quiz, survey, presentation)

constraints: Use discriminated union pattern with 'type' field
Each activity type should extend base fields (id, created_at, type)
Support lesson_completed, quiz_completed, survey_completed, presentation_created types
Add JSDoc comment explaining purpose and union structure

tasks.input_state: File user-dashboard.types.ts exists with Database import
tasks.output_state: ActivityFeedItem union type exists with all four activity variants
tasks.acceptance_criterion: ActivityFeedItem type is exported as discriminated union with type field
tasks.verification_command: grep -q "export type ActivityFeedItem" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && grep -q "type:" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add PresentationOutline interface
tasks.purpose: Define type for presentations table widget data derived from building_blocks_submissions table

constraints: Use Pick to select relevant fields (id, title, created_at, updated_at)
outline field is Json type from Database
Add JSDoc comment explaining purpose

tasks.input_state: File user-dashboard.types.ts exists with Database import
tasks.output_state: PresentationOutline interface exists with id, title, outline, created_at fields
tasks.acceptance_criterion: PresentationOutline interface is exported and includes title and outline fields
tasks.verification_command: grep -q "export interface PresentationOutline" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && grep -q "title" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && grep -q "outline" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add UserDashboardData aggregate interface
tasks.purpose: Create aggregate interface combining all dashboard widget types as main loader return type

constraints: Combine all previously defined types
Use optional fields where data may not exist (e.g., courseProgress?, surveyScores?)
ActivityFeedItem should be an array
PresentationOutline should be an array
Add JSDoc comment explaining this is the main loader return type

tasks.input_state: All individual dashboard type interfaces exist (T3-T7)
tasks.output_state: UserDashboardData interface exists combining all dashboard types with proper optional/array fields
tasks.acceptance_criterion: UserDashboardData interface is exported and references all dashboard types
tasks.verification_command: grep -q "export interface UserDashboardData" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && grep -q "courseProgress" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && grep -q "ActivityFeedItem" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/user-dashboard.types.ts && pnpm typecheck
